description: CompositionBlack sleeveless sweater made of 100% excel, has grey stripes across the front chest, ribbed V-neck, armholes and hemline, and embroidered branding on left chest FittingComfortWash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeDo not ironWelcome the winter in style with this sleeveless sweater from spykar. The fabric traps your body heat inside and keeps the winter chill at bay, while the ribbing offers a customized Fit. Wear this over shirts or t-shirts and semi-formal pants for a stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatersHeight: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
